name: Architeuthis dux
description: One of the largest invertebrates on Earth. Rarely seen alive, it inhabits the twilight zone of the ocean.

name: Vampyroteuthis infernalis
description: Despite its name, it is neither squid nor octopus. Survives in oxygen-minimum zones where few creatures can.

name: Melanocetus johnsonii
description: A deep-sea anglerfish that uses a bioluminescent lure to attract prey in total darkness.

name: Physeter macrocephalus
description: The deepest-diving mammal on Earth. Known to battle giant squids in the crushing darkness of the deep.
